connectionLost.title: Server Connection Lost
connectionLost.message: The backend server is unreachable. Please check if the server is running.

chats.subtitle: Send and reply to WhatsApp messages in real time
chats.noSessionsDesc: Please connect a WhatsApp session from the <1>Sessions</1> menu first to use the chat feature.
chats.noMessagesInChat: No messages yet. Send the first message to get started!
chats.noPermission: You do not have permission to send messages
chats.placeholderDesc: Choose a conversation to read and reply.
chats.messageMasked: 🔒 Masked by WhatsApp for linked devices — check your primary phone

errors.markRead: Failed to mark chat as read

chats.loadMessagesError: Couldn't load messages. Check the server logs.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: The dashboard encountered an unexpected error.

login.connectionError: Unable to connect to server. Please try again.
login.footer: Made with ❤️ by Yudhi Armyndharis and the FlexWA Community

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your WhatsApp sessions and activity
dashboard.noSessions: No sessions found. Create one to get started.

charts.title: Message Analytics
charts.empty: No message activity in this period.
charts.error: Couldn't load message analytics. Check the server logs.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Manage your WhatsApp sessions and QR code connections

empty.title: No sessions found
empty.description: Create a new session to get started

create.title: Create New Session
create.label: Session Name
create.hint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Example: customer-support, bot-1
create.invalidChars: Invalid characters. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed.
create.tooLong: Name must be 50 characters or less ({{length}}/50).
create.duplicate: Session with this name already exists.

delete.title: Confirm Delete
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete session "{{name}}"?

qr.title: Scan QR Code
qr.step3: 3. Tap Link a Device and scan this QR
qr.unavailable: QR code not available yet. Try again in a moment.

toasts.failedDesc: The WhatsApp session failed to start. Open the session to see the reason.

forceKill.title: Kill Stuck Session
forceKill.message: Are you sure you want to force-kill session "{{name}}"?
forceKill.warning: This will forcefully terminate the WhatsApp browser process. The session may need to be re-scanned on restart.
forceKill.success: Session has been force-killed. You can restart it now.

pairing.phoneHint: Digits only (no +, spaces, or dashes) in international format (country code + number).
pairing.invalidPhone: Enter a valid phone number: 6–15 digits, country code first, no symbols.
pairing.step3: 3. Tap Link a Device, then tap Link with phone number instead
pairing.step4: 4. Enter the 8-character code shown above on your phone
pairing.waitingConnection: Waiting for your phone to link…

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: Configure HTTP callbacks for real-time event notifications
webhooks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook?

filters.title: Filters (optional)
filters.hint: Only fire when all conditions match. Applies to message events.

empty.title: No webhooks configured
empty.description: Add a webhook to receive real-time event notifications

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Create reusable message templates for each WhatsApp session
templates.previewEmpty: Start writing a template to preview it here.
templates.deleteConfirm: Delete template "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

empty.title: No templates saved
empty.description: Create a reusable template to speed up common replies and notifications.
empty.noSessionsDesc: Create a WhatsApp session before adding templates.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Manage API keys for authentication and access control
apiKeys.createdHint: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again.

empty.title: No API keys created
empty.description: Create an API key to authenticate your requests

confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.revokeMessage: Are you sure you want to revoke {{name}}? It will no longer work.

logs.title: Audit Logs
logs.subtitle: Track and review all API actions and system events

empty.title: No logs found
empty.description: Audit logs will appear here as actions are performed

messageTester.title: Message Tester
messageTester.subtitle: Send test messages through the API
messageTester.selectGroupHint: Select a group from your WhatsApp
messageTester.caption: Caption
messageTester.responseEmpty: Send a message to see the API response
messageTester.notOnWhatsApp: This number is not registered on WhatsApp

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.subtitle: Configure server, database, cache, storage, and engine settings

database.title: Database Configuration
database.builtInDesc: FlexWA will manage a PostgreSQL container for you
database.schemaDesc: PostgreSQL schema (ignored for SQLite). Default 'public'. The schema must already exist.
database.sslDesc: Enable TLS/SSL for secure database connections
database.sslRejectUnauthorizedDesc: Reject self-signed or invalid certificates. Turn off for managed Postgres with self-signed certs (Supabase, Heroku, Render, Railway).
database.migrationsHint: Migrations are managed automatically. Use CLI for manual migrations.

engine.title: WhatsApp Engine
engine.headlessDesc: Run the browser without a visible UI (recommended for production).
engine.noBrowser: This engine connects over WebSocket — it has no browser, so there are no headless or browser-argument settings. The active engine is applied after a restart.
engine.restartNote: Switching the engine takes effect after a server restart.

redis.title: Redis
redis.enableDesc: Required for caching, session storage, and BullMQ queues
redis.builtInDesc: FlexWA will manage a Redis container for you
redis.queueDesc: Use message queues for reliable message and webhook delivery
redis.disabledDesc: Enable Redis for caching, session storage, and BullMQ message queues.
redis.bullMqUrlHint: Open it with an ADMIN API key — a browser tab can't authenticate.

storage.title: Storage Configuration
storage.builtInDesc: FlexWA will manage a MinIO (S3-compatible) container for you
storage.endpointHint: For MinIO or other S3-compatible services

infrastructure.envPinNote: Pinned by an environment variable — this is the running value; dashboard changes won't apply until that variable is unset.

migration.title: Heads up — this changes the data backend
migration.dbWarning: The new database starts empty. Download a backup of your current data now (while still on the old database), then restore it after the restart.
migration.storageWarning: Existing media files are not moved to the new storage backend automatically; they'll remain in the old location.
migration.backupHint: Export all data as JSON before switching databases, then import it after the switch. The backup contains webhook secrets and proxy credentials in plaintext — store it securely and delete it after restoring.
migration.importConfirm: Importing will REPLACE all current data with the backup ({{rows}} rows). This cannot be undone. Continue?
migration.invalidFile: That file isn't a valid FlexWA data backup.
migration.importTooLarge: Backup is too large for the request limit. Increase BODY_SIZE_LIMIT on the server and try again.

restart.idleDesc:
Configuration has been saved to .env.generated.
A server restart is required to apply the changes.
restart.dontClose: Please do not close this window
restart.successMsg: Server is back online! The page will reload automatically.
restart.errorMsg: Server did not respond after 30 seconds. Please check the Docker logs and restart manually.

infrastructure.statusLoadError: Couldn't load the current infrastructure status. Refresh to try again.

empty.title: No plugins installed
empty.description: Install a plugin to extend what FlexWA can do.

config.title: Configure {{name}}
config.noOptions: No configuration options available for this plugin
config.uiHandshakeError: The plugin configuration UI did not initialize. Use the schema form below if available.

installModal.title: Install a plugin
installModal.hint: Upload a plugin packaged as a .zip (with a manifest.json). It runs sandboxed once enabled.
installModal.tooLarge: The file exceeds the 5 MB limit.

toasts.savedDesc: Server restart required to apply changes.

sessions.activationDesc: Choose which sessions this plugin runs for.
sessions.perSessionDesc: Override the global config for a session; untouched fields inherit the global value.

instances.title: Instances
instances.description: Provision per-account instances for this integration. Each instance has its own signing secret and ingress URL.
instances.empty: No instances yet. Create one to get an ingress URL and secret.

form.verifyTokenPlaceholder: Token the provider echoes on verification

created.title: Instance created
created.hint: Copy the secret now — it is shown only once.

regenerate.title: Regenerate secret
regenerate.confirm: Regenerate the signing secret for {{id}}? The current secret stops working immediately.

delete.title: Delete instance
delete.confirm: Delete instance {{id}}? Its ingress URL and secret stop working immediately.

errors.invalidId: Instance ID must be letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores (max 64).
errors.duplicateId: An instance with that ID already exists.
